name: J. Hart Plumbing
description: Stop letting water issues damage your property. Fast, reliable, and professional plumbing solutions from a trusted local team that fixes the problem right the first time.

name: Motherloade Tree & Defensible Space
description: Protect your acreage and lower your fire insurance risks. Professional brush clearing, trail cutting, and tree removal tailored specifically to Tuolumne County regulations.

name: Warren Roofing
description: Protect your home from harsh mountain winters and intense summer heat. Decades of local expertise ensuring your roof stands up to the extremes of the Motherloade.

name: Diamondback Grill
description: The quintessential downtown dining experience. Enjoy locally sourced ingredients, incredible burgers, and a vibrant atmosphere right in the historic center of Sonora.

name: Columbia Mercantile 1855
description: Step back in time for artisan provisions, local goods, and historic charm in the heart of the State Park. A curated taste of California's Gold Rush heritage.

name: SNAC - Sierra Nevada Adventure Co.
description: Don't hit the high country without stopping here first. From premium trail gear to kayak rentals, SNAC equips you for serious adventure in the Sierra Nevada.
